candidates.name: PackingSolver
candidates.decision_reason: Seul candidat audite specialise en packing geometrique avec un mode box 3D, six rotations, sortie de certificat et limite de temps. Le build produit doit desactiver CLP et Knitro.
candidates.guarantees: Anytime heuristic result in box mode; no BGIG infeasibility proof is accepted without an independently complete search and fresh BGIG recertification.

licenses.data: No external benchmark data is integrated by L07A
licenses.dependencies: Boost-1.84.0 BSL-1.0, HiGHS-1.13.1 MIT, and pinned fontanf libraries MIT. GoogleTest is test-only. CLP EPL-2.0 and proprietary Knitro are excluded from the candidate build.

runtime.automated: CLI with CSV input and JSON/certificate output

mapping.complex_shapes_3d: unsupported; irregular mode is two-dimensional only
mapping.model_loss: Reservation and BGIG semantic-level cases must return unsupported; only the faithful rectangular free-bin subset can be ranked.

candidates.name: 3d-bin-container-packing / LAFF
candidates.decision_reason: Solveur rectangulaire 3D specialise, actif, leger, avec LAFF, recherche brute-force pour petits cas, obstacles, rotations et deadlines.
candidates.guarantees: LAFF is heuristic. Brute-force enumerates orders and rotations for small supported instances, but BGIG exact status still requires completion plus fresh recertification.

licenses.data: No dataset bundled into the BGIG adapter
licenses.dependencies: Core 4.2.1 depends on first-party api and points modules under Apache-2.0; visualizer and test dependencies are excluded.

runtime.windows: JDK 17 available; Maven artifact usable from an isolated classpath
runtime.automated: Java API wrapped by a local JSON-lines process

mapping.model_loss: Only axis-aligned boxes and rectangular obstacles are native; unsupported BGIG policies must fail closed.

candidates.name: OR-Tools CP-SAT
candidates.decision_reason: Moteur CP/SAT mature, Windows, pilotable et capable de statuts exacts sur un modele entier fidele. Il apporte une famille differente des heuristiques 3D.
candidates.guarantees: FEASIBLE is a witness only; OPTIMAL or INFEASIBLE can be used as exact solver status only for a lossless integer BGIG formulation that completed.

licenses.data: No dataset bundled into the adapter
licenses.dependencies: Python distribution dependencies and bundled native notices must be locked from the 9.15.6755 wheel before execution; no optional commercial solver is used.

runtime.automated: Python API in isolated virtual environment

mapping.p45_variants: modelled_only_when every active rule has an exact integer encoding
mapping.complex_shapes_3d: no native geometry; finite voxel or decomposition models are theoretical only and outside L07
mapping.model_loss: Any non-lossless millimetre scaling or omitted BGIG rule makes the case unsupported.

cost.distribution: official wheel about 24 MiB before transitive packages

candidates.name: SCIP with PySCIPOpt
candidates.decision_reason: Moteur CIP/MIP mature et permissif, avec wheel Windows autonome. Il permet une formulation distincte et des limites natives de temps et memoire.
candidates.guarantees: Optimal or infeasible status is meaningful only after a faithful finite model completes; every positive placement is independently recertified by BGIG.

licenses.binary: PySCIPOpt wheel bundles SCIP under their notices
licenses.data: No dataset bundled into the adapter
licenses.dependencies: Official wheel is the only candidate artifact; optional proprietary LP solvers and older SCIP licenses are excluded.

runtime.automated: PySCIPOpt API in isolated virtual environment

mapping.p45_variants: possible through a faithful CIP model only
mapping.complex_shapes_3d: no native geometry; decomposition or non-linear models are theoretical and outside L07
mapping.model_loss: Numerical tolerances and every omitted BGIG rule are guarded by fresh recertification; lossy cases are unsupported.

candidates.name: HiGHS / highspy
candidates.decision_reason: Moteur MIP permissif, compact, Windows et sans service. Il constitue le controle entier lineaire distinct du CIP et du CP/SAT.
candidates.guarantees: MIP status is accepted only for a faithful formulation and remains subject to numeric tolerances; placements are always recertified by BGIG.

licenses.data: No dataset bundled into the adapter
licenses.dependencies: Core documents no third-party utilities; Python wheel and NumPy dependency notices must be locked before execution. Apache optional binary variants are excluded.

runtime.automated: highspy API in isolated virtual environment

mapping.p45_variants: possible only for rules with a faithful MIP linearization
mapping.complex_shapes_3d: no native geometry; finite decompositions are theoretical and outside L07
mapping.model_loss: Unsupported when BGIG rules cannot be expressed without relaxation; numerical positives are recertified.

cost.distribution: small official wheel; exact installed size measured in L07C

candidates.name: Choco Solver
candidates.decision_reason: Candidat CP credible et actif, mais sa formulation recouvre largement CP-SAT tout en ajoutant un second adaptateur Java. Conserve comme secours si CP-SAT echoue au packaging.
candidates.guarantees: Complete finite-domain search is possible for a faithful bounded model; no native 3D packing guarantee.

licenses.dependencies: Maven dependency graph must be locked before promotion; no product artifact is selected in L07A.

mapping.model_loss: Same lossless-model requirement as CP-SAT with higher adapter cost.

candidates.name: Chuffed
candidates.decision_reason: Solveur LCG credible et compilable sous Windows, mais son modele FlatZinc generique recouvre largement CP-SAT et exige un second adaptateur de contraintes couteux.
candidates.guarantees: Complete finite-domain solving is possible for a faithful FlatZinc model; no native 3D geometry.

licenses.binary: MIT solver; MiniZinc bundle has a separate multi-component notice set
licenses.dependencies: Standalone source build and third-party notices must be audited; the full MiniZinc installer is not required and remains forbidden.

runtime.windows: standalone CMake and MSVC route documented by the official repository

mapping.model_loss: FlatZinc mapping must be proven lossless; packaging overhead dominates the marginal method value.

candidates.name: COIN-OR CBC
candidates.decision_reason: MIP mature et Windows, mais EPL-2.0 declenche la gate copyleft d'ADR-0081 et la methode recouvre HiGHS. Aucune integration produit sans decision humaine separee.
candidates.guarantees: MIP optimal/infeasible statuses on a faithful linear model, subject to numerical tolerances and BGIG recertification.

licenses.dependencies: COIN-OR stack varies by build and requires a complete artifact notice audit.

mapping.model_loss: Same formulation limits as HiGHS plus an unresolved product-license gate.

candidates.name: Timefold Solver Community Edition
candidates.decision_reason: Moteur metaheuristique general actif, mais sans modele 3D natif, sans preuve d'infaisabilite et avec un cout d'integration superieur a sa valeur marginale pour L07.
candidates.guarantees: Best-so-far heuristic only; no general infeasibility or optimality proof.

licenses.dependencies: Large Java dependency graph; enterprise-only features are excluded.

mapping.model_loss: A full custom domain and move system would be required before comparison.

candidates.name: py3dbp
candidates.decision_reason: Petit controle heuristique rectangulaire utile pour lecture, mais release 2020, maintenance faible et absence de deadline ou limite memoire contractuelle. Il ne compte pas comme moteur mature.
candidates.guarantees: Heuristic placement only; no optimality or infeasibility proof.

licenses.dependencies: No material runtime dependency surface documented

mapping.model_loss: Only a narrow rectangular-box subset is representable.
